Botify business flows

npm library
🦞 work with OpenClaw

Solutions

Customer’s Bots

Among all agentic flow solutions, creating a complex customer-facing bot chat can be the most challenging. This type of flow aims to collect information from customers in order to achieve business objectives. In fact, many companies start to replace or supplement their UI applications with bot chats. Our PicoFlow framework is 2-3X more productive in creating chatbots for business than LangGraph! Watch this demss below

Business Flows

Injecting AI into existing business flows is one of the most pressing activities. PicoFlow can easily orchestrate a business flow with judicious addition of AI capabilities using the latest context engineering techniques. PicoFlow provides observability, traceability and replayability in production to mitigate probabilistic hallucination by LLM.

RAG

We have experience in multi-faceted RAG techniques including various chunking strategies: overlapping/recursive/late-chunking/summarization, re-ranker, and Graph-assisted RAG.

Demos

See PicoFlow in action.

Show many PicoFlow techniques.

Git Docs
Hotel Reservation

Complete reservation flow example.

Git YouTube Docs
Medical Appointment

Schedule visits and route intake details to care teams.

Git Docs
TravelAgent

A smart agent for booking travel. This agent was reimplemented but based on many similar LangGraph examples.

Git YouTube
UiDemo

a React ChatBot UI to connect to picoflows

Git

Q&A

Frequently Asked Questions

PicoFlow is a developer-friendly yet highly advanced Agentic framework designed to drastically accelerate the process of Botifying business flows. Unlike LangGraph, PicoFlow is specifically optimized for creating customer-facing bots and business flow orchestration, offering 2-3X higher productivity. PicoFlow provides built-in observability, traceability, and replay-ability features to help mitigate probabilistic hallucination issues in production environments. You can checkout the comparison chat

The PicoFlow Agentic Framework is currently available in JavaScript, chosen to align with the large and established microservices developer ecosystem. By integrating directly with NestJS, we enable Node.js developers to rapidly create production-ready Agentic endpoints with minimal friction. We expect a future Python version will be available. We also use the basic abstraction of LangChain to interface with LLMs

One of PicoFlow’s primary goals is to enable average developers—without deep AI training—to be productive within just days. The framework is designed with developer-friendliness in mind, featuring intuitive APIs and comprehensive documentation that makes it easy to get started quickly while still providing advanced capabilities for complex use cases.

Our team has extensive experience with multi-faceted RAG techniques including various chunking strategies such as overlapping, recursive, late-chunking, and summarization. We also work with re-rankers to improve retrieval quality and Graph-assisted RAG for more sophisticated knowledge representation and retrieval patterns.

picoflow Agentic Framework is not open source yet. The library can be downloaded from npm. A sophisticated demo can be downloaded from Hotel Reservation

We are prioritizing our effort in working with strategic partners. We can offer business a one-stop solution to creating reliable yet sophisticated bot flows with our services and software. Better yet, we can do a quick prototye for you before you decide to commit to using our products and services. email us.

We believe picoflow.io is better for building complex chabots than Langchain. We are currently welcoming early investors to expand our business. Fell free to email us.

Picoflow Software License Agreement (v1.0) — personal use is free; commercial use requires a paid tier:

  • Free Personal Use: One individual, non-commercial, open-source or academic; no warranty/SLA.
  • Team – $199/mo or $1,990/yr: Unlimited users in one org; up to 3 production instances; commercial rights; email support (≤2 business days).
  • Business – $799/mo or $7,990/yr: Unlimited production instances/regions; customer-facing SaaS allowed; priority email+Slack (≤1 business day); quarterly architecture review.
  • Enterprise – custom: Multi-entity coverage; optional white-label/OEM; custom SLA/BAA/DPA; dedicated engineer.
  • Keys: PICOFLOW_KEY per org; Team keys allow 3 concurrent instances, Business/Enterprise unlimited; audits permitted.
  • Data & Privacy: No data sent to Picoflow; runtime talks only to your LLM provider and your DB; startup-only license check.
  • Restrictions: No reverse engineering, removal of notices, redistribution, or building a competing framework.
  • Warranty & Liability: 90-day material-conformance warranty for paid tiers; otherwise “AS IS”; liability capped at fees paid in prior 12 months (zero for free tier).
  • Termination: Commercial subscriptions auto-renew; misuse or non-payment can terminate rights; upon termination cease use immediately.

A valid key through 06/30/2026 is:

PICOFLOW_KEY=AQFpvg0RakMHAAAAjfAr04seEa3Ez1cp6lWBIA9LyGce17rpWnH2ajkk_wJyOiIoxwXHKQJcnM_JADytkXa151wULSOAhLCnRd3xkFD7U0m0hpYN
Picoflow Software License Agreement (v1.0)
# Picoflow Software License Agreement

**Version 1.0 — Effective upon download, installation, or use**

Copyright © 2026 Picoflow.io, Inc. All rights reserved.

---

## IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE USING

By downloading, installing, activating, or using the Picoflow software framework ("Software"), you ("Licensee") agree to be bound by the terms of this License Agreement ("Agreement"). If you do not agree, do not use the Software.

---

## 1. FREE PERSONAL USE LICENSE

The Software is free to use for **personal, non-commercial purposes only**.

Personal use means:
- Individual use by a single person for hobby, learning, or personal projects
- Open-source projects that generate no revenue
- Academic or research use with no commercial application
- Evaluation and prototyping — prior to any commercial deployment

**This free license is strictly limited to personal use. Any commercial use requires a paid license (see Section 2).**

---

## 2. WHAT COUNTS AS COMMERCIAL USE

Commercial use includes, but is not limited to:

- Deploying the Software in a product or service that generates revenue — directly or indirectly
- Using the Software within a business, startup, or organization — regardless of size or profit status
- Providing services to clients, customers, or employers using the Software
- Embedding the Software in a product sold, licensed, or distributed to others
- Using the Software to automate business workflows, handle customer interactions, or support internal business operations
- Any use where the Software contributes to generating economic value

**If you are unsure whether your use qualifies as commercial, it does. Contact sales@picoflow.io.**

---

## 3. COMMERCIAL LICENSE TIERS

To use the Software commercially, purchase one of the following licenses:

### Team License — $199/month or $1,990/year
- Unlimited users within a single legal entity
- Up to 3 production deployment instances (e.g., dev, staging, production)
- Commercial production use
- Email support (2 business day response)

### Business License — $799/month or $7,990/year
- Unlimited users within a single legal entity
- Unlimited production instances across any environments or cloud regions
- May power customer-facing SaaS products and services
- Priority email + Slack support (1 business day response)
- Quarterly architectural review

### Enterprise License — Custom Pricing
- Multi-entity and subsidiary coverage
- White-label and OEM rights
- Custom SLA, BAA/DPA, dedicated support engineer
- Contact sales@picoflow.io

---

## 4. RESTRICTIONS (ALL USERS)

Regardless of license tier, Licensee may not:

- Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any obfuscated portions of the Software
- Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices
- Redistribute, sublicense, sell, or transfer the Software or any rights therein to any third party
- Use the Software to build a competing AI orchestration framework or product

---

## 5. LICENSE KEYS

Commercial licenses are activated via a **PICOFLOW_KEY** provided upon purchase:

- Keys are issued per organization and may not be shared externally
- Team keys support up to 3 concurrent instances; Business and Enterprise keys are unlimited
- Licensor may audit license usage with reasonable notice
- Report compromised keys immediately to support@picoflow.io

---

## 6. DATA & PRIVACY

Picoflow is built around data sovereignty:

- **The Software does not collect, transmit, or store any end-user data.** All session state and conversation data resides exclusively within Licensee's own database (MongoDB, CosmosDB, or compatible).
- At runtime, the Software connects only to Licensee's configured LLM provider and Licensee's own database. No data passes through Picoflow.io servers.
- License key validation at startup does not transmit any session, conversation, or user data.
- Licensee is solely responsible for compliance with applicable data protection laws (GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, etc.) within their own infrastructure.
- Enterprise customers may request a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) or Business Associate Agreement (BAA).

---

## 7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

7.1 The Software and all associated materials are and remain the exclusive intellectual property of Picoflow.io, Inc.

7.2 Applications, AI flows, and products built **using** the Software remain the sole intellectual property of Licensee. Picoflow.io, Inc. makes no claim to Licensee's work.

---

## 8. LIMITED WARRANTY

Licensor warrants that the Software will perform materially in accordance with its published documentation for 90 days from purchase ("Warranty Period") for paid licenses. The free personal use tier is provided **"AS IS"** with no warranty of any kind.

**EXCEPT AS SET FORTH ABOVE, LICENSOR EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.**

---

## 9. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW:

- Licensor's total liability shall not exceed fees paid by Licensee in the **12 months preceding the claim**. For free (personal use) licenses, liability is zero.
- Licensor is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits or data.
- Licensor is not liable for the behavior or outputs of any LLM or AI model used with the Software, or for decisions made by AI agents built using the Software.

---

## 10. TERM & TERMINATION

10.1 Personal use licenses are perpetual for the version downloaded, subject to compliance with this Agreement.

10.2 Commercial subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least **30 days** before renewal via billing@picoflow.io.

10.3 Licensor may terminate any license immediately upon:
- Commercial use without a valid paid license
- Material breach not cured within 30 days
- Non-payment of fees
- Use of the Software in violation of applicable law

10.4 Upon termination, Licensee must immediately cease all use of the Software.

---

## 11. GOVERNING LAW & DISPUTES

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States. Disputes unresolved through good-faith negotiation within 30 days shall be submitted to binding arbitration under AAA Commercial Arbitration Rules.

---

## 12. GENERAL

- **Entire Agreement.** This Agreement supersedes all prior agreements regarding the Software.
- **Amendments.** Licensor may update this Agreement with 30 days' notice. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
- **Severability.** If any provision is unenforceable, remaining provisions continue in full force.
- **Assignment.** Licensee may not assign this Agreement without prior written consent from Licensor.

---

## CONTACT

**Picoflow.io, Inc.**
sales@picoflow.io — Licensing & commercial inquiries
support@picoflow.io — Technical support
billing@picoflow.io — Billing and renewals
legal@picoflow.io — Legal and compliance

Website: https://www.picoflow.io

---

*Picoflow Software License Agreement v1.0 — © 2026 Picoflow.io, Inc. All rights reserved.*
Open as full page

About Us

our story

For over two years, we have been at the forefront of developing cutting-edge AI solutions. Long before terms like Agentic Framework and Context Engineering became mainstream, we were already employing a variety of advanced techniques. Only recently have these methods been formally recognized under these names. We’ve also successfully leveraged popular Agentic frameworks, such as LangGraph, in our projects. Agentic frameworks are versatile, with different patterns designed to address unique challenges. One of the most common—and complex—use cases is developing customer-facing bots that either complement or fully replace UI flows. While LangGraph remains our go-to framework for implementing these solutions, we’ve identified numerous areas where improvements can be made.

Our primary goal in working with Agentic frameworks is to enable average developers—without deep AI training—to be productive within just days. With this in mind, we’re proud to introduce PicoFlow: a developer-friendly yet highly advanced Agentic framework designed to drastically accelerate the process of Botifying Business FlowsTM, making it significantly faster than any existing solution. For more details, check out our tutorial section!

Contact Us

T: 360-818-4535
